name: migration-planner
description: Sitecore XP AWS-to-Azure migration planning assistant. Guides architects through structured discovery, cross-reference analysis, phased estimation, and client-ready deliverable generation.

skills.name: migrate-knowledge
skills.description: Background knowledge for Sitecore XP AWS-to-Azure infrastructure migrations. Provides domain expertise, estimation heuristics, and analysis frameworks.

skills.name: migrate-new
skills.description: Start a new migration assessment. Creates the .migration/ directory and initializes project metadata.

skills.name: migrate-discover
skills.description: Conduct or resume the discovery interview. Walks through 17 dimensions of infrastructure discovery with branching questions.

skills.name: migrate-analyze
skills.description: Run cross-reference analysis on discovery data. Identifies risks, dependency chains, complexity multipliers, and gaps.

skills.name: migrate-estimate
skills.description: Generate phased migration effort estimates with optimistic/expected/pessimistic ranges and role-based breakdowns.

skills.name: migrate-plan
skills.description: Generate a comprehensive client-ready migration plan document from accumulated assessment data.

skills.name: migrate-gaps
skills.description: Show unanswered questions, unvalidated assumptions, and missing discovery dimensions ranked by impact.

skills.name: migrate-compare
skills.description: Compare migration approaches side-by-side (e.g., PaaS vs IaaS, SQL MI vs SQL VM). Pass the comparison topic as an argument.

skills.name: migrate-calibrate
skills.description: Feed back actuals from a completed migration to compare against estimates and improve future accuracy.

skills.name: migrate-switch
skills.description: Switch between multiple migration assessments in the same project. Lists all assessments and lets you pick which one to work on.

skills.name: migrate-dashboard
skills.description: Generate an interactive HTML dashboard with toggleable scope, AI alternatives, assumption scenarios, and real-time estimate recalculation.

skills.name: migrate-challenge
skills.description: Run a skeptical quality review on a completed workflow step. Three agent personas (Orchestrator, Challenger, Researcher) autonomously review data quality with live web search validation, looping until confidence threshold is met.

skills.name: migrate-research
skills.description: Deep-research any platform and build a complete knowledge pack. Runs a coordinated team of research agents (Architecture Analyst, Version Historian, Ecosystem Scout, Gotcha Miner, Effort Calibrator, Security Auditor, Licensing Analyst, Path Mapper, Discovery Builder) that write structured data directly to the database via MCP tools.

skills.name: migrate-wbs
skills.description: Generate a work breakdown structure (Epics/Stories/Tasks) from the refined migration estimate. Creates actionable work items suitable for import into Jira, Azure DevOps, or other project management tools.

skills.name: migrate-team
skills.description: Recommend team composition (roles, headcount, allocation, cost projections) based on the migration estimate, complexity, and timeline.
